tool_args.label: Utica Avenue B46 Corridor
tool_args.raw_text: The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit: Phase II Study.

payload.description: The Utica Avenue B46 corridor in Brooklyn, identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service. Second-busiest bus route in NYC, carrying nearly 50,000 passengers per day. Crucial connection to 3 4 A C subway trains and 30 bus routes.

tool_args.label: B46
tool_args.raw_text: Build on existing Bus Priority and Safety Project to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS.

payload.description: B46 bus route along Utica Avenue in Brooklyn. Second-busiest bus route in NYC, carrying nearly 50,000 passengers per day. Includes B46 Limited and B46 Local service. Proposed for upgrade to B46 SBS (Select Bus Service).

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Utica Avenue Select Bus Service. Build on existing Bus Priority and Safety Project to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS.

payload.description: Proposed Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue, building on existing 2014 Bus Priority and Safety Improvements to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS. Includes off-board fare collection, additional bus lanes, transit signal priority, service planning changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.

tool_args.label: 2014 Bus Priority and Safety Improvements
tool_args.raw_text: 2014 Bus Priority and Safety Improvements. Offset and curbside bus lanes on 1.3 miles of Utica Av corridor from St. John's Pl to Church Av.

payload.description: 2014 bus priority and safety improvements on Utica Avenue including offset and curbside bus lanes on 1.3 miles from St. John's Pl to Church Av, left-turn restrictions, left-turn bay additions, parking changes (+19 spaces near Eastern Parkway, -22 spaces along southern part of corridor), and new loading zones.

tool_args.raw_text: Capital improvements at SBS stations: Real-time passenger information, Bus bulbs (sidewalk extensions at bus stops), New shelters, plantings, benches, etc.

tool_args.raw_text: Utica Avenue Public Workshop | November 13, 2014

payload.description: Utica Avenue Select Bus Service public workshop

tool_args.label: Step 1: Data collection and analysis
tool_args.raw_text: Step 1: Data collection and analysis - Fall 2014

payload.description: Step 1: Data collection and analysis - Monitor and evaluate 2014 project, analyze full B46 corridor, traffic counts, parking survey, safety data, transit operations, ridership/transfer data, sources of delay, local and limited service patterns

tool_args.label: Step 2: Conceptual design
tool_args.raw_text: Step 2: Conceptual design - Fall/Winter 2014

payload.description: Step 2: Conceptual design - Identify feasible street design changes south of Church Avenue and north of St. John's Place, develop conceptual service plans for B46 SBS and B46 Local, solicit input from community members

tool_args.label: Step 3: Develop corridor plan
tool_args.raw_text: Step 3: Develop corridor plan - 2015

payload.description: Step 3: Develop corridor plan - Develop detailed street design, prepare traffic analysis, identify SBS station locations, develop capital designs for station improvements, refine details with CAC and general public

tool_args.label: Step 4: Final design plan
tool_args.raw_text: Step 4: Final design plan - TBD, Potential 2015 SBS service launch

payload.description: Step 4: Final design plan - Finalize corridor design, develop implementation plan, potential 2015 SBS service launch, prepare construction phasing plan for capital elements
